title: Sweet Flaky Japanese Tiger Prawns Curry
description: A singlepot, sweet and flaky Japanese curry with tiger prawns, caramelized carrots, and a hint of bhunastyle aromatics, all in a creamy coconut base.

ingredients.name: Japanese curry powder
ingredients.notes: or blend of curry powder, coriander, cumin

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add grated ginger and minced garlic; sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Stir in diced carrot and toast for 1 minute.
Sprinkle the curry powder and toasted fenugreek seeds over the vegetables; stir continuously for 30 seconds to bloom the spices.
Pour in coconut milk and dashi stock, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer and let it cook for 5 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Add the tiger prawns, ensuring they are evenly distributed in the liquid; cook, stirring occasionally, until the prawns turn pink and opaque, about 3–4 minutes.
Fold in fresh baby spinach and let it wilt in the heat, about 1 minute.
Season with tamari and drizzle honey; stir well, adjust salt with a pinch of salt if needed, and let the curry reduce slightly for 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of chopped cilantro if desired.
